name: WONG
title: THE WONDERFUL

abilities.name: Exit Stage
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage caused by an enemy model, it may drain a (soulstone) to make a Pyrotechnic marker within 1", then place within 6".

abilities.name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
abilities.text: At the start and end of this model's activation, it may look at the top card of its deck and may discard it.

abilities.name: Three Demon Bag
abilities.text: When a non-peon enemy is killed within 3", infuse a (soulstone).

actions.name: Iron Fan of Tsu Li
actions.effects: The target gains a Glowy token. Move the target up to 2" for each raise this action receives.

actions.name: Finale
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove up to three Glowy tokens from models within 6" of the target.
actions.effects: This attack deals +1 damage for each Glowy token removed. If this action receives a raise, place the target within 6" of its current location.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Fzzzzap!
actions.effects: Make a Pyrotechnic marker in range, then resolve its end of turn effects using a suit in this action's final duel total. Then, if this action did not receive a raise, remove the marker.

triggers.name: Well-Prepared
triggers.text: Immediately add one suit of this model's choice to its duel total.

actions.name: "Clear the Stage!"
actions.effects: Allies within (a)2" of the target may move up to 3".

triggers.name: "Just. Hold. Still."
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target gains a Glowy token and draws two cards.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE WONDERFUL' back='The Wonderful'
extraction_notes: The Overwhelmed trigger on Finale has no suit icon visible, which is unusual - this may be a formatting issue on the card or it may be an 'any suit' trigger.
